assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR release channel, not Stable or Extended channel which would provide better stability for long-running training workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenance exclusion with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' which blocks all upgrades, not specifically 'no minor or node upgrades' that would allow security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response shows daily maintenance window at 02:00 UTC, not a narrow weekend-only window for better predictability

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly shows separate node pools: h100-training-pool for GPU workloads and utility-pool for system workloads, with proper isolation

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' on the H100 training pool and includes manual upgrade procedures in operational scripts

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes checkpoint backup functionality and graceful shutdown handling with terminationGracePeriodSeconds for checkpoint saving

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response shows GPU driver configuration but does not mention testing or validation in staging before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or version compatibility considerations for upgrades
